sections.paragraph:
μηλωτή, ῆς, ἡ (Philemon Com. [IV/III b.c.] 25; Pamphilus [I b.c./I a.d.] in Ael. Dion. ω, 1; cp. ο, 5; Apollon. Dysc., Synt. 191, 9; OGI 629, 32; PTebt 38, 22 [II b.c.]; PMich 421, 24 [I a.d.]; LXX) sheepskin of the cloak worn by prophets (3 Km 19:13, 19; 4 Km 2:8, 13f) Hb 11:37; 1 Cl 17:1.—DELG s.v. 2 μῆλον. M-M. TW.

Philemon Philemon Com , IV–III b.c. (a few of the verses included here belong to Comp., q.v.)—List 5

Ael. Dion. Ael. Dion. = Aelius Dionysius, II a.d.—List 5

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

PTebt PTebt = The Tebtunis Papyri—List 4

PMich PMich = Michigan Papyri—List 4

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 648
